---
title: "Your Document Title"
author: "Jacopo Olivieri"
date: "2023-02-22"
output:
  html_document:
    fig_width: 6
    fig_aspect_ratio: 0.618
knitr:
  opts_chunk:
    echo: false
    warning: false
    message: false
    fig.align: "center"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
# Initialize packages with version control
if (!requireNamespace("renv", quietly = TRUE)) {
  install.packages("renv")
}

# Run manual renv commands if needed
# renv::activate() # Activate the project library
# renv::restore()  # Restore the environment if running for first time
# renv::snapshot()  # After adding/updating packages, snapshot the state


# Load required packages
required_packages <- c("rmarkdown", "rio", "tidyverse", "purrr", "here",
                       "janitor", "data.table", "lubridate")
install_if_missing <- function(packages) {
  new_packages <- packages[!sapply(packages, requireNamespace, quietly = TRUE)]
  if (length(new_packages) > 0) {
    install.packages(new_packages)
  }
  invisible(sapply(packages, library, character.only = TRUE))
}
install_if_missing(required_packages)


# Initialize logging
log_path <- here::here("output", "log", "explore_data.log")
if (!dir.exists(dirname(log_path))) {
  dir.create(dirname(log_path), recursive = TRUE)
}
logger::log_appender(logger::appender_file(log_path))
logger::log_layout(logger::layout_glue_colors)
```

## Load Data

```{r}
data <- import(here("data", "processed", "merged_edm_data.RData"), trust = TRUE)
data_summary <- import(here("data", "processed", "merged_edm_data_with_summary.RData"), trust = TRUE)

data_summary
data
```



```{r}
x=nrow(dat)
#x=6
spill_count <- 0
block_start <- as.POSIXct(NA)
block_end <- as.POSIXct(NA)
dur12 <- hours(12)
dur24 <- hours(24)

for (i in seq_len(nrow(dat))) {
  current_start <- dat$start_time[i]
  current_end <- dat$end_time[i]
  
  # 12-hour block (first spill or >24h gap)
  if (is.na(block_end) || 
      difftime(current_start, block_end, units="hours") > 0) {
    
    # Initialise block start
    block_start <- current_start
    block_end <- current_start + hours(dur12)
    
    # Update spill count
    diff_block_current = difftime(current_end, block_start, units="hours") %>% 
      as.numeric()
    spill_over_12h <- ceiling((diff_block_current-dur12)/dur24)
    n_spills <- 1L + spill_over_12h
    spill_count <- spill_count + n_spills
    
    # Update block 
    block_start <- block_end + hours(dur24*(spill_over_12h))
    block_end <- block_start + hours(dur24)
    
    # 24 hour block
  } else if (difftime(current_end, block_start, units="hours") > 0) {
    
    # Update spill count 
    diff_block_current = as.numeric(
      difftime(current_end, block_start, units="hours"))
    spill_over_24h <- ceiling(diff_block_current/dur24)
    n_spills <- spill_over_24h
    spill_count <- spill_count  + n_spills
    
    # Update block
    block_start <- block_end + hours(dur24*(spill_over_24h-1))
    block_end <- block_start + hours(dur24)
    }
  }
print(spill_count)
```


```{r}
spill_count <- 0
block_start <- as.POSIXct(NA)
block_end <- as.POSIXct(NA)
dur12 <- hours(12)
dur24 <- hours(24)

for (i in seq_len(nrow(dat))) {
  current_start <- dat$start_time[i]
  current_end <- dat$end_time[i]
  
  # Calculate difference between spill start and current block end
  if (!is.na(block_end)) {
    time_to_block <- difftime(current_start, block_end, units="hours")
  }
  
  # 12-hour block (first spill or >24h gap)
  if (is.na(block_end) || time_to_block > 0) {
    
    # Initialise block start
    block_start <- current_start
    block_end <- current_start + dur12
    
    # Update spill count
    diff_current = as.numeric(difftime(current_end, block_start, units="hours"))
    spill_over_12h <- ceiling((diff_current-12)/24)
    spill_count <- spill_count + 1L + spill_over_12h
    
    # Update block 
    block_start <- block_end + (dur24* spill_over_12h)
    block_end <- block_start + dur24
    
    # 24 hour block
  } else if (difftime(current_end, block_start, units="hours") > 0) {
    
    # Update spill count 
    diff_current <- as.numeric(difftime(current_end, block_start, units="hours"))
    spill_over_24h <- ceiling(diff_current/24)
    spill_count <- spill_count + spill_over_24h
    
    # Update block
    block_start <- block_end + (dur24 * (spill_over_24h-1))
    block_end <- block_start + dur24
    }
}

dt
```

```{r}
# Vectorized function for counting spills using 12/24 method
count_spills <- function(start_times, end_times) {
  if (length(start_times) == 0) return(0)
  
  # Initialise variables
  spill_count <- 0
  block_start <- as.POSIXct(NA)
  block_end <- as.POSIXct(NA)
  dur12 <- hours(12)
  dur24 <- hours(24)
  
  # Pre-sort inputs
  ord <- order(start_times)
  start_times <- start_times[ord]
  end_times <- end_times[ord]
  
  # Process each spill sequentially
  for (i in seq_len(length(start_times))) {
    current_start <- start_times[i]
    current_end <- end_times[i]
    
    # Calculate difference between spill start and current block end
    if (!is.na(block_end)) {
      gap <- difftime(current_start, block_end, units="hours")
    }
    
    # 12-hour block (first spill or >24h gap)
    if (is.na(block_end) || gap > 0) {
      # Initialize block start
      block_start <- current_start
      block_end <- current_start + dur12
      
      # Update spill count
      diff_current <- as.numeric(difftime(current_end, block_start, units="hours"))
      spill_over_12h <- ceiling(max(0, (diff_current-12))/24)
      spill_count <- spill_count + 1L + spill_over_12h
      
      # Update block
      block_start <- block_end + (dur24 * spill_over_12h)
      block_end <- block_start + dur24
      
    # 24 hour block
    } else {
      # Update spill count
      diff_current <- as.numeric(difftime(current_end, block_start, units="hours"))
      spill_over_24h <- ceiling(max(0, diff_current)/24)
      spill_count <- spill_count + spill_over_24h
      
      # Update block
      block_start <- block_end + (dur24 * (spill_over_24h-1))
      block_end <- block_start + dur24
    }
  }
  
  return(spill_count)
}


```









```{r}
dat <- dat %>%
  group_by(water_company, year, outlet_discharge_ngr) %>%
  arrange(start_time, .by_group = TRUE) %>% 
  ungroup()
dt = as.data.table(dat)
setkey(dt, water_company, year, outlet_discharge_ngr)


tic("data.table")
dt_result <- dt[order(start_time),
             .(total_spill_count = count_spills(start_time, end_time),
               total_spill_hrs = sum(as.numeric(
                 difftime(end_time, start_time, units = "hours")))),
             by = .(water_company, year, outlet_discharge_ngr)]
toc()

tic("dplyr")
dplyr_result <- dat %>%
  group_by(water_company, year, outlet_discharge_ngr) %>%
  arrange(start_time, .by_group = TRUE) %>%
  summarise(
    total_spill_count = count_spills(start_time, end_time),
    total_spill_hrs = sum(as.numeric(
              difftime(end_time, start_time, units = "hours"))),
    .groups = 'drop')  
toc()
```

```{r}
benchmark_results3 <- microbenchmark(
  data.table = {
    dt_result <- dt[,
                 .(total_spill_count = count_spills(start_time, end_time),
                   total_spill_hrs = sum(as.numeric(
                     difftime(end_time, start_time, units = "hours")))),
                 by = .(water_company, year, outlet_discharge_ngr)]
  },
  dplyr = {
    dplyr_result <- dat %>%
      group_by(water_company, year, outlet_discharge_ngr) %>%
      summarise(
        total_spill_count = count_spills_fast(start_time, end_time),
        total_spill_hrs = sum(as.numeric(
                  difftime(end_time, start_time, units = "hours"))),
        .groups = 'drop')
  },
  times = 10  # Number of times to run each expression
)

# View results
print(benchmark_results3)

# For a nice visualization
autoplot(benchmark_results3)  # requires ggplot2
```



```{r}
count_spills <- function(start_times, end_times) {
  if (!length(start_times)) return(0L)
  
  # POSIXct to numeric (seconds since epoch) to optimise speed
  start_times <- as.numeric(start_times)
  end_times   <- as.numeric(end_times)
  
  # Pre-sort inputs by start_time
  ord <- order(start_times)
  start_times <- start_times[ord]
  end_times   <- end_times[ord]
  
  # Pre-compute durations in seconds
  dur12 <- 12 * 3600
  dur24 <- 24 * 3600
  
  # Initialise variables
  spill_count <- 0L
  block_start <- NA_real_
  block_end   <- NA_real_
  
  for (i in seq_along(start_times)) {
    current_start <- start_times[i]
    current_end   <- end_times[i]
    
    # Calculate difference between spill start and current block end
    if (!is.na(block_end)) {
      gap <- (current_start - block_end) / 3600
    }
    
    # 12-hour block (first spill or >24h gap)
    if (is.na(block_end) || gap > 0) {
      block_start <- current_start
      block_end   <- current_start + dur12
      
      # How many 24-hour blocks occur after the first 12 hours (if any)
      diff_current   <- (current_end - block_start) / 3600
      spill_over_12h <- ceiling(pmax(0, diff_current - 12) / 24)
      spill_count    <- spill_count + 1L + spill_over_12h
      
      # Update block times
      block_start <- block_end + (dur24 * spill_over_12h)
      block_end   <- block_start + dur24
      
    } else {
      # 24 hour block
      # Update spill count
      diff_current   <- (current_end - block_start) / 3600
      spill_over_24h <- ceiling(pmax(0, diff_current) / 24)
      spill_count    <- spill_count + spill_over_24h
      
      # Update block times
      block_start <- block_end + dur24 * (spill_over_24h - 1)
      block_end   <- block_start + dur24
    }
  }
  
  return(spill_count)
}


# Apply the optimized function
dt_result <- dt[order(start_time),
               .(
                 total_spill_count = count_spills_fast(start_time, end_time),
                 total_spill_hrs = sum(as.numeric(difftime(end_time, start_time, units = "hours")))
               ),
               by = .(water_company, year, outlet_discharge_ngr)]

dt_result %>% 
  filter(outlet_discharge_ngr == "SP7106038010")
dplyr_result %>% 
  filter(outlet_discharge_ngr == "SP7106038010")
```




```{r}
dt <- data.table(
  year = c(2023, 2023, 2023),
  start_time = as.POSIXct(c(
    "2022-12-15 00:00:01",  # Crosses previous year boundary
    "2023-03-15 00:00:01",  # Within year
    "2023-12-15 00:00:01"   # Near year end
  ), tz = "UTC"),
  end_time = as.POSIXct(c(
    "2023-02-15 00:00:01",  # Within year
    "2023-05-15 00:00:01",  # Within year
    "2024-02-15 00:00:01"   # Crosses next year boundary
  ), tz = "UTC")
)

dt[["key_join"]] <- sapply(dt[["key_join"]], function(x) paste(unlist(x), collapse = ", "))

# Apply the transformation
dt[, `:=`(
  start_time_new = pmax(start_time, 
                    as.POSIXct(paste0(year, "-01-01 00:00:00"), tz = "UTC")),
  end_time_new = pmin(end_time, 
                  as.POSIXct(paste0(year + 1, "-01-01 00:00:00"), tz = "UTC"))
)]

# Print transformed data
dt
unique(as.data.table(dt))
# Get rows that are duplicates
duplicates <- dt[duplicated(dt) | duplicated(dt, fromLast = TRUE), ]
```



```{r}
#' Split records that cross month boundaries into separate monthly records
#' @param df Data frame containing spill records with start_time and end_time columns
#' @return Data frame with split records for cross-month spills
split_monthly_records <- function(df) {
  
  # Convert to data.table once at the start
  dt <- data.table::copy(as.data.table(df))
  dt <- dt[end_time > start_time]
  
  # Pre-calculate floor dates for all records at once
  dt[, `:=`(
    floor_start = floor_date(start_time, "month"),
    floor_end = floor_date(end_time, "month")
  )][, needs_split := floor_start != floor_end]
  
  # Split the data.table based on the needs_split column
  result_list <- list(
    # Single-month records
    dt[needs_split == FALSE],
    
    # Multi-month records that need splitting
    dt[needs_split == TRUE, {
      months_seq <- seq(
        as.Date(floor_start),
        as.Date(floor_end),
        by = "month"
      )
      
      data.table(
        start_time = c(
          start_time,
          as.POSIXct(months_seq[-1], tz = "UTC")
        ),
        end_time = c(
          as.POSIXct(months_seq[-1], tz = "UTC") - 1,
          end_time
        )
      )
    }, by = setdiff(names(dt), c("start_time", "end_time", "key_join", 
                                "floor_start", "floor_end", "needs_split"))]
  )

  # Combine results and clean up temporary columns
  result <- rbindlist(result_list, fill = TRUE)
  result[, c("floor_start", "floor_end", "needs_split") := NULL]
  
  return(result)
}

dt_og = dt
dt <- example_data

dt %>% 
  filter(end_time == start_time)


example_data <- data.table(
  id = 1:4,
  year = c(2021, 2021, 2021, 2021),
  start_time = as.POSIXct(c(
    "2021-01-15 10:00:00",  # Same month
    "2021-01-25 14:00:00",  # Crosses to next month
    "2021-03-28 23:00:00",  # Crosses multiple months
    "2021-12-31 23:00:00"   # Crosses to next year
  ), tz = "UTC"),
  end_time = as.POSIXct(c(
    "2021-01-20 15:00:00",  # Same month
    "2021-02-05 16:00:00",  # Crosses to next month
    "2021-05-02 02:00:00",  # Crosses multiple months
    "2022-01-02 01:00:00"   # Crosses to next year
  ), tz = "UTC"),
  value = c(10, 20, 30, 40)
)

res <- split_monthly_records(example_data)
res
```


```{r}
dt_monthly
```
